case_title: POTRERO COOURTS PARTNERS, LTD vs. KOBAYASHI, KEIZO et al

docket_entries.description: RM220/#1/DESMOND. STIPULATION THAT COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN MAY ACT AS JUDGE PRO TEM SIGNED BY BOTH SIDES.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KOBAYASHI, KEIZO KOBAYASHI, KOMIKO

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOBAYASHI, KEIZO KOBAYASHI, KOMIKO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2225 - 23RD ST. #208, S.F. $2,970.00 RENT, $585.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $146.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,701.00, LEASE FORFEITED, S/E 2-19-98 2PM, FUR S/E TO 3-5-98 5PM IF DEFT PAYS $2930. B Y 2-19-98 2PM. FUR S/E IF DEFTS PAY CURRENT RENT TIMELY. P ERS PROP LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. SEE JUDGMENT FOR ADDL DETAI LS.
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF POTRERO COOURTS PARTNERS, LTD COURT TRIAL SET FOR FEB-18-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 624 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF POTRERO COOURTS PARTNERS, LTD AS TO DEFENDANT KOBAYASHI, KEIZO KOBAYASHI, KOMIKO DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED

M8/#624, COMM S KAPLAN, CSR L NAJERA, CLK H HAMILTON GREER SMITH FOR PLTF, ROSALIE DAVIS FOR DEFTS, WHO ARE PRESENT. CASE CALLED FOR TRIAL; SETTLED, AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULAITON FOR PLTF/AGAINST DEFTS FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 2225 - 23RD ST. #208, S.F. LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT TO ISSUE BUT EXECUTION STAYED. MONEY JDGMT: RENT & DAMAGES $2714, LATE FEES $256.40, COSTS, $146 FEES, $585. FOR A TOTAL OF $3701.14. SHOULD DEFTS PAY TO PLNT BY 2-19-98 2PM $2930 IN RENT/DAMAGES/LATE FEES, WRIT SHALL STAY TO 3-5-98. SHOULD DEFTS PAY $100. PER MO. BEGINNING 3-1-98 THRU 4-5-98 (ON 4/5 A FINAL PYMT OF $131.14) + PAY RENT IN A TIMELY FASHION (WITH A 5 DAY GRACE PERIOD FOR BOTH RENT & PYMTS), WRIT WILL FURTHER STAY. IF DEFTS MISS A PAYMENT, WRIT WILL ISSUE. AFTER 8-5-98, PLAINTIFF WILL SIGN A STIPULATION TO VACATE JUDGMENT (TO BE PREPARED BY DEFENSE COUNSEL) & DISMISS.
